case.label: Quiz practice phone photo produces nonblank accommodation guidance

boundaries: Use of calculator except for calculation tests

notObviouslyRelevant.name: Test in a small group when requested.

parentGuidance.summary: For the upcoming 30-minute timed quiz on Areas of Circles and Composite Figures, the following accommodations are noted: Extended time on tests (2 days) and Use of calculator except for calculation tests. Please confirm how the extended time will be applied to this specific timed quiz and ensure the calculator can be used for area calculations.

staffNotes: Confirm how the extended time accommodation applies to this timed practice quiz.
Confirm the student's plan for using the calculator for area calculations on the quiz.
teacherGuidance.summary: The student has accommodations for tests, including extended time and calculator use, which may be relevant for this timed practice quiz on areas of circles and composite figures.

parentGuidance.summary:
For the upcoming 30-minute timed quiz on Areas of Circles and Composite Figures, the following accommodations are noted:

*   **Extended time on tests (2 days):** This accommodation may help the student manage the 30-minute time limit.
*   **Use of calculator except for calculation tests:** It is unclear if the problems require calculation tests, so please confirm with the teacher if a calculator should be used for these area problems.
